info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

mimetype.description: MIME type of the uploaded file

width.description: Image width of the uploaded file

height.description: Image height of the uploaded file

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/attachments/notify/%7Btoken%7D?filename=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/attachments/%7Btoken%7D?filename=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

201.description: return the upload URL and the key.

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"contentType\":\"image/png\",\"contentLength\":123,\"expiresIn\":3600,\"hash\":\"xxxxxxxx\",\"type\":1,\"baseId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/attachments/signature", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "\"string\""

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/attachments/upload/%7Btoken%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
